# Support

## Before opening a ticket
Check the project conventions in:
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `AGENTS.md`

For local verification, the repository already defines these commands:
- `composer run setup`
- `composer run dev`
- `composer run test`
- `npm run build`

## Where to ask for help
- Use a GitHub issue for reproducible bugs or concrete feature requests
- Use the bug template for broken behavior
- Use the feature template for enhancements or workflow requests

## Include this context
When asking for help, include:
- route / URL
- locale (`de` or `en`)
- affected entity (`FuneralService`, `Customer`, `Deceased`, `Relative`, `Billing`)
- relevant logs or screenshots
- whether the issue also occurs after `composer run test`
